subject: Fw: Re: 795 5th Avenue, NY, NY
body:
-----Original Message-----
From: PNemcova@AglowProperties.com

Date: Tue, 6 Nov 2007 23:28:47 
To:"Jeffrey- Epstein" <kellens@earthlink.net>
Subject: Re: Re: 795 5th Avenue, NY, NY


Hell dear Sarah,
Hope U R well. I know this is not perfect. We wanted to reintroduce ourselves to your friend. We provided an initial property option for their review based on our brief conversation. We would like to take a moment to discuss in further detail not only the exact property he is looking for but also what their real estate investment goals are. It would be very beneficial for them if we understood what their short and long term goals are so we are on the same page when locating the perfect property. We look forward to working with Jeffrey and his friend and helping to accomplish their real estate goals.
I'm in NY back on 8th. I could meet Jeffrey then. But also, I have some info on Prague, so if Jeffrey would like to speak I'm happy to speak before we meet:-)
Thank U so so much.
Have an amazing evening :-)
Let us light up your life!
Lots of love, light, and happiness,
Petra

Petra Nemcova
Partner

Aglow Properties
160 Riverside Blvd. #509
New York, NY 10069
646.761.4337

PNemcova@AglowProperties.com
